name: client::e2e
description: Run e2e Playwright tests in dev mode; use this for local/regression testing

name: client::install
description: Run arbitrary `npm install *` commands within `client/`

name: client::playwright
description: Run arbitrary `npx playwright <command>` within `client/` (e.g. `just client playwright test`)

name: client::run
description: Run arbitrary `npm run *` commands within `client/`

name: client::test
description: Run ui/ux tests

name: cloud::demo-db-url
description: Retrieve the DB_URL for the Demo environment

name: cloud::demo-jurisdiction-authored
description: Retrieve a list of jurisdictions who have authored conditions in the demo application

name: cloud::demo-show-network-address-pool
description: Retrieve the current backend address pool configuration for the Demo environment

name: cloud::demo-update-network-address-pool
description: Update the current backend address pool configuration for the Demo environment

name: database::check-code
description: Find a specific code within a condition, version, and code system. Usage: just db check-code "COVID-19" "3.0.0" "rxnorm_codes" "2284960"

name: database::check-condition-version
description: Check if conditions exist for a specific version (e.g., `just db check-condition-version 3.0.0`)

name: database::check-config-combo
description: Find configurations for a jurisdiction and condition name (e.g., `just db check-config-combo wa zika`)

name: database::check-configs-by-jurisdiction
description: Find all configurations for a specific jurisdiction (e.g., `just db check-configs-by-jurisdiction wa`)

name: database::check-seeding
description: Run all DB sanity checks (seeding, integrity, etc)

name: database::clean
description: Completely wipes the refiner local development database

name: database::count-conditions
description: Get the count of conditions, grouped by version

name: database::delete-configuration
description: Cascade delete all the related configuration artifacts. For use after an E2E test run

name: database::fetch-tes-data
description: Runs the pipeline scripts that fetch data from the TES API (you must have a TES_API_KEY in your local .env file)

name: database::find-condition
description: Find a condition by its name (case-insensitive search)

name: database::query
description: Run a raw SQL query against the database (e.g., `just db query "SELECT * FROM conditions LIMIT 5;"`)

name: database::recent-configurations
description: Show the 5 most recently created configurations

name: database::refresh
description: Runs a full database refresh (wipe, migrate, seed)

name: database::seed
description: Runs the seeding script to seed the database with condition data

name: database::set-jd
description: Set the jurisdiction for the "refiner" user. Creates the jurisdiction record if it does not exist

name: database::table
description: Describe the schema of a table (e.g., `just db table conditions`)

name: database::tables
description: List all tables in the public schema

name: database::validate-tes-data
description: If new or changed files from `fetch-tes-data` are found, check that their structure supports the seeding process.

name: decisions::new
description: Create a new decision from the template found in docs/decisions/.template

name: dev::down
description: Stop the project's core services with docker compose.

name: dev::rm
description: Remove the project's core services and their volumes with docker compose.

name: dev::show
description: Show running `dibbs-ecr-refiner` containers with helpful output

name: dev::up
description: Start only the project's core services with docker compose.

name: docker::build-all
description: Build all project containers locally

name: docker::build-app
description: Build the application container locally

name: docker::build-lambda
description: Build the lambda container locally

name: docker::build-ops
description: Build the ops container locally

name: lint
description: Run linting and formatting rules on all code

name: migrate::create
description: Create a new migration script

name: migrate::local
description: Shortcut: migrate local

name: migrate::run
description: Run migrations with migrate for a given environment (local, demo, prod)

name: risk-assessments::new
description: Create a new risk assessment from the template found in docs/risk-assessments/.template

name: server::check
description: Run mypy type checks

name: server::fix
description: Run Ruff checker, fix things, and formatter

name: server::install
description: Install dependencies locally

name: server::install-all
description: Install all depenencies e.g Refiner and Lambda

name: server::install-dev
description: Install all dependencies locally

name: server::install-lambda
description: Install Lambda dependencies locally

name: server::install-lambda-dev
description: Install all Lambda dependencies locally

name: server::lint
description: Run Ruff checker and formatter

name: server::seed-localstack
description: Seed Localstack with the infra needed for manual tests

name: server::test
description: Run pytest wrapper. Must include arguments.

name: server::test-all
description: Run all tests

name: server::test-integration
description: Run Integration tests

name: server::test-lambda
description: Run Lambda tests

name: server::test-scenarios
description: Run Scenarios tests

name: server::test-unit
description: Run Unit tests

name: server::update-snapshots
description: Update Scenarios tests snapshots.

name: test
description: Run tests on all code
